series_metadata.series_description: Daily audit-trail backup files of all entries made into Treasurer of State computer software that runs on the AS400 server. This includes entries made by the Accounting and Revenue Management departments in the Adtek BankMate software. Such entries show the user name and time that a file was opened, created, deleted, and saved.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain one day on AS400, then save to back-up tape, and delete from AS400. Retain back-up tape pursuant to relevant retention schedules for back-up tapes., Electronic: Delete
